name: Video Translator
description: Upload a video, automatically transcribe → translate subtitles → synthesize new voice-over → output a bilingual video. Reuses subtitle-maker (ASR) + tts-studio (TTS).

description_i18n.zh: 上传一段视频，自动识别语音 → 翻译字幕 → 合成新配音 → 输出双语视频。复用 subtitle-maker (ASR) + tts-studio (TTS)。
description_i18n.en: Upload a video, automatically transcribe → translate subtitles → synthesize new voice-over → output a bilingual video. Reuses subtitle-maker (ASR) + tts-studio (TTS).

author: OpenAkita
